nasb.text: They will all come and settle on the steep ravines, on the ledges of the cliffs, on all the thorn bushes and on all the watering places.

esv.text: And they will all come and settle in the steep ravines, and in the clefts of the rocks, and on all the thornbushes, and on all the pastures.

cnv.text: 牠們都必飛來，落在陡峭的山谷中、巖石的穴裡、一切荊棘叢中和所有的草場上。

ccb.text: 遍布险峻的山谷、岩穴、一切荆棘丛和草场。

csbs.text: 它们全都会飞来， 停落在深谷中、岩石缝里、 所有的荆棘丛中、所有的草场上。
